calendar.matters:
MOTION To Strike Portion Of Complt For Unlawful Detainer By Deft Barton Sparagon & Kathryn Selleck
Off Calendar Apr-04-2002 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES:
OFF CALENDAR MOOT -- Demurrer was heard on March 19, 2002 and an order filed on March 26, 2002. (JJM/kh) LEE BATARA, CSR 3759

DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Mar-08-2002 Advanced From Apr-04-02 To Mar-19-02 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 301

DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Mar-26-2002 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: J. Wallace Oman, Esq., 415-658-5400, appeared on behalf of defendants and demurring parties Barton Sparagon, et al. J. Scott McKay, Esq., 415-433-2700, appeared on behalf of plaintiff Mahmoud Larizadeh.

The demurrer was argued. Moving party wishes to change special demurrer for uncertainty to general demurrer. A sur-reply in opposition to a general demurrer may be filed by close of business on March 20, 2002, at which time the matter will be deemed submitted. Hon. James J. McBride. Reporter: Eric Throne CSR #7855 (md)
